headline: Thermo Fisher’s (NYSE:TMO) Q1 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
summary: Life sciences company Thermo Fisher (NYSE:TMO) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 6.2% year on year to $11.01 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $5.44 per share was 3.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Thermo Fisher Scientific Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
